title: Rebuild and NGEs Unused Concepts
wikitext:
[]: Rebuild and NGE's Unused Concepts             Quote Post by Skullraper » Wed Jan 02, 2008 3:31 am I noticed something interesting when looking in “Concept Design Works” (an art book). I assume (since I can’t read Japanese) that many of the designs in the book are rejected prototypes of the designs seen in the series. With that in mind it’s interesting to note that some of the “redesigns” we see in Rebuild seem to have been taken from older unused sketches. Eva-00’s color scheme for example and the plug loading rig. Then I was reading in the wiki about NGE Proposal. The book basically outlines the early concept and story of the show. The final product ended up being much different with many of the angels being changed as well as the back story. Then it occurred to me. What if Rebuild is a partial telling of the original story? Maybe we’ll get to see an angel descend from the moon and vaporize North America! Also, Proposal mentioned unique Eva-05 and Eva-06 models. This would seem to have been confirmed already by the 2nd movie trailer. In light of this does anyone know if Rebuild will feature new angels? Perhaps Shateiel and Turel? One more thing. I had heard rumors that Rebuild is actually a continuation of the events after EoE. I wouldn’t necessarily be adverse to that. But can someone tell me what the basis is for this interpretation?

[]: Re: Speculation/Questions regarding Rebuild. (maybe spoilers             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Jan 02, 2008 3:51 am Skullraper wrote: In light of this does anyone know if Rebuild will feature new angels? Perhaps Shateiel and Turel?

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Wed Jan 02, 2008 4:14 am Instead of 12 Angels coming from the moon and vaporizing North America and Eva-06, Eva-06 and its pilot (Probably Kaworu) come down from the moon. Kitty-killing irony, I know. A lot of the old proposal was probably rejected as being too complex for production (You do see considerable detail in the first two episodes and again at various points in the series)

[]:             Quote Post by universalperson » Wed Jan 02, 2008 8:38 pm Look, right now, anything is possible for Rebuild. Anything.

[]:             Quote Post by Shiro » Thu Jan 03, 2008 6:47 pm I'm hoping we'll get Aluka, or at least something similar, for Webuild's conclusion. He's certainly leading us that direction. (Glasses Girl would be the Angel from Episode 22, and Kaworu-kun would be the all-powerful 12th, coming from the moon) I doubt we'll get it though. But it would be freaking awesome.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jan 04, 2008 12:55 pm Arka or Arqa, please. He's certainly leading us that direction.

[]:             Quote Post by CtHuLhU » Fri Jan 04, 2008 1:59 pm Webuild wrote: Fyutsuki : Really the sixth angel? Gendo : Ya, let Eva-01 get a battle. <...> Gendo : Even by using an any funds, we should destroy eight other Angels. Fyutsuki : All of them.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Fri Jan 04, 2008 6:14 pm We're not getting Arqa. We're getting Werewolf Asuka all the way.

[]:             Quote Post by Skullraper » Fri Jan 04, 2008 6:50 pm NAveryW wrote: We're not getting Arqa. We're getting Werewolf Asuka all the way.

[]:             Quote Post by Shiro » Fri Jan 04, 2008 6:55 pm EDIT: Ornette filled me in on the difference between my source and yours. Never mind. And yeah, I know it's a leap, but it sounds too intriguing for Anno to just drop it altogether.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jan 04, 2008 8:52 pm Skullraper wrote: Werewolf Asuka!? Am I missing something?

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Sun Jan 06, 2008 12:29 am Oh my god! The ending! I understand it now! Werewolf Asuka bit off Rei's arm, which somehow ends up with Shinji on the beach! This is how Rebuild Final will end.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Mon Jan 07, 2008 6:51 pm Mr. Tines wrote: I think we've got all the funny out of that joke now

[]:             Quote Post by universalperson » Mon Jan 07, 2008 10:39 pm BobBQ wrote: Is it just me, or does it seem like everyone is pulling the sequel-or-remake-built-of-cutting-room-floor-snippets thing now? I'm seeing quite a bit of that in the other circles I frequent.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Tue Jan 08, 2008 2:28 am universalperson wrote: I think everyone is hoping Rebuild becomes their favorite fanfic...or something.

[]:             Quote Post by Shiro » Tue Jan 08, 2008 2:39 am Well, on the fanfic topic, I'm actually doing it with the intent to go all the way. It's just for fun anyway. I read the Arka (Dammit, I keep wanting to say Aluka...) ending synopsis, and it intrigued me just enough to think about it a lot, and I ended up with something that I think might come out damn good, if I can stick with it. But anyway, Arka's ending was vague enough that they're still being creative. Arka was only described as "the promised land" and "ruins" were mentioned. Not much more than that. I think that leaves enough room for creativity. Plus, Arka sounds awesome enough that we can let that slide.

[]:             Quote Post by universalperson » Tue Jan 08, 2008 1:26 pm BobBQ wrote: universalperson wrote: I think everyone is hoping Rebuild becomes their favorite fanfic...or something.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sat Apr 04, 2009 6:32 am [Split/merged tangent from here .] Small odds that they'll "transfer" Eva-05 from Bethania to Nerv HQ, so... Wait, wait, wait! If Bethania Base is on the moon (Tabgha looks like it is), we have an Eva fighting Angels on the Moon. Haven't we heard of this in a certain proposal somewhere?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Apr 04, 2009 12:54 pm UrsusArctos wrote: Wait, wait, wait! If Bethania Base is on the moon (Tabgha looks like it is), we have an Eva fighting Angels on the Moon. Haven't we heard of this in a certain proposal somewhere?

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Sat Apr 04, 2009 6:50 pm I wish anno had kept that idea for rebuild. Epic scene would have been epic
